objective: Define a hardware-independent KinectFrame data model and implement a deterministic mock/replay frame source using only synthetic fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: A typed KinectFrame contract exists with color, depth, joints, calibration metadata, timestamps, and tracking state.
A mock source replays a deterministic fixture without hardware or Azure SDK imports.
Tests cover valid frame replay, exhausted replay behavior, and tracking-lost behavior.
No dependency installation, device access, or SDK import occurs.
